title: ceratostylis wenzelii
intro: Ceratostylis wenzelii is a species of orchid native to the Philippines, known for its unique flower shape and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been reported to aid in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Ceratostylis wenzelii include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically dried and used in decoctions or infusions, and it can also be made into a tincture or ointment for topical application.
